rows.label: qev100901_MSG0001
rows.name:
Are you the BLADE who agreed
to accept my request?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev100901_MSG0002
rows.name:
I presently require 900 units
of miranium. But it seems you
do not have it with you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev100901_MSG0003
rows.name:
I would humbly request that you
gather it, then return to speak
with me again. And thank you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev100901_MSG0004
rows.name:
Are you the BLADE who agreed
to accept my request?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev100901_MSG0005
rows.name:
I presently require 900 units of miranium
and... Ah! I see you have it with you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev100901_SEL0021
rows.name: Hold on to your miranium for now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev100901_MSG0007
rows.name:
This is 900 units on
the nose. Thank you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev100901_MSG0008
rows.name:
I will see that it is delivered to the arms
manufacturers immediately—it should help
considerably with their current resource shortage.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev100901_MSG0009
rows.name:
Thank you for your assistance. I hope
you will continue to harvest miranium
to aid in the city's development.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev100901_MSG0011
rows.name:
Please return once you have sufficient
miranium to spare. Until then.[ST:wait ]
